title: A Guardian Chooses Sacrifice
description: On pages 20–23, this part focuses on a guardian chooses sacrifice, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Guardian Chooses Sacrifice. Pell carries Alabasta’s hope into the air as the bomb plot reaches its most sacrificial moment. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Could it be true...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Are you two idiots,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Really gonna believe that crap?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Of course as hell not!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yeah, stupid! I don't believe it at all!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: VOHH!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: O-okay, calm down...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If that's the case, then our job right now's to get to the palace ASAP! So stop sniffling already.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: At least, until the rumbles of this war ends...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Thank you everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's still too early for thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's right! And if you wanna say thanks to a pirate, it'll be with shiny goods, if you catch my drift! 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How much are you planning to extort from this country!?

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Whew, I finally managed to untangle it.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: So this is what he meant by an attack that can be only used once...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The rebels have already penetrate this far into the city...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The situation may have changed,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But right now, I gotta get to the palace!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: And you'd do well remembering this one thing if nothing else...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That guy eats a WHOLE CRAP-LOAD of food after a battle...!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yes, okay...

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: We'll be waiting for you at Alubarma!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: This is it, boys! Don't stumble now!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Time to take off!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: We'll join up back at the palace!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: "Yes, I

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Com- wander Chaka!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: This has to be a night- mare...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: This can't be hap- pening...!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: The rebels are pressing right behind us now!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Chakasa!

summary: This part develops a guardian chooses sacrifice and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
